rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Defendants Motion To Strike All Allegations Or False Facts In Plaintiffs Complaint That Tiffany Barber Is Disabled.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 19, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT RALAN WONG and PATTY HERNANDEZ's Motion To Strike All Allegations Or False Facts DENIED. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that a Motion to Strike per CCP 436 and 437 may be brought at this stage of litigation. Late-filed unauthorized reply is stricken.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Defendants Statutory And Nonstatutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Dismissal With Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 19, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT RALAN WONG and PATTY HERNANDEZ's Statutory And Nonstatutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Defendants are seeking judgment on the pleadings as to the Complaint. Defendants fail to show that all causes of action are barred by res judicata and/or collateral estoppel. e.g. invasion of privacy. Late-filed unauthorized reply is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BROADWELL, LLC VS. HUANG YING SHAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 19, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT HUANG YING SHAO's Motion To Compel Disco Responses And For Sanctions DENIED as requested. Plaintiff served responses on January 3, 2017 by mail and provided copies of the responses at 11:31 a.m. on January 9, 2017. Defendants' motion to compel responses and to deem admissions admitted was filed at 12:27 p.m. on January 9, 2017, i.e. after responses have been provided. Under the circumstances a different motion would be appropriate, e.g. motion to compel verification, motion to compel further responses, etc. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1,000.= (501/REQ)
